title: alkanna hellenica
intro: Alkanna hellenica, also known as Alkanet or Dyer's Bugloss, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal agent. The health benefits of Alkanna hellenica include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. Alkanna hellenica can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
